title: Spark Security Configuration
description: Defines the security groups and permission rights for a MintPlayer Spark application. Used by the MintPlayer.Spark.Authorization package. Place this file at App_Data/security.json.

$schema.description: Optional JSON Schema reference for editor IntelliSense.

groups.description: Map of group ID (GUID string) to the group's translated display name. The special GUID '00000000-0000-0000-0000-000000000000' typically represents the 'Everyone' group.

groupComments.description: Optional descriptions for groups. Key is the group ID (GUID), value is a translated human-readable description.

rights.description: List of rights (permissions) that grant or deny access to resources for specific groups.

TranslatedString.description: A translated string where keys are ISO language codes (e.g., 'en', 'fr', 'nl') and values are the translated text.

Right.description: Represents a permission assignment linking a security group to a resource. Denials take precedence over grants.

id.description: Unique identifier (GUID) for this right assignment.

resource.description: The resource this right applies to. Format: 'Action/EntityType' or 'Action/EntityType/Property'. Examples: 'QueryRead/Car', 'QueryReadEditNewDelete/Person', 'CarCopy/Car'.

groupId.description: The ID of the security group this right is assigned to. Must match a key in the top-level 'groups' object.

isDenied.description: When true, this explicitly denies the permission. Denials take precedence over grants.

isImportant.description: When true, marks this as an important/sensitive permission. Can be used for enhanced logging or audit purposes.
